_comment_keys: API KEYS — never stored here. Set as environment variables before starting:
export MEDIA_API_KEY=<server auth key>           # required — X-Api-Key header
export PEXELS_API_KEY=<pexels key>               # required when 'pexels' in sources
export PIXABAY_API_KEY=<pixabay key>             # required when 'pixabay' in sources
export WIKIMEDIA_API_TOKEN=<token>               # OPTIONAL — raises Commons quota to 5K/hr
export OPENVERSE_CLIENT_ID=<client_id>           # OPTIONAL but recommended (free OAuth2)
export EUROPEANA_API_KEY=<key>                   # required when 'europeana' in sources
export FREESOUND_API_KEY=<key>                   # required for SFX tab freesound source
# Openverse: anonymous works but is rate-limited. Register free OAuth2 app (2 min).
The server will print ERROR and exit at startup if any REQUIRED key is missing.
_comment_transport: file (NFS/shared mount) — files are on a shared filesystem.
projects_root  : path to shared dir AS SEEN FROM THIS SERVER.
file_mount_root: same dir AS SEEN FROM THE VC EDITOR machine.
The server saves downloads to projects_root; returned file:// URLs use file_mount_root.
_comment_sources: Safe default sources — RULE 9. Only sources with proven pipelines enabled.
archive intentionally omitted from default until PD allowlist is tested end-to-end.
loc and picryl disabled: loc=free-text rights unsafe, picryl=API defunct.

_comment: Per-source candidate counts for the SFX tab.
candidates_sfx = max sounds fetched per sfx_item per source.
Set to 0 to disable a source for SFX search.

wikimedia._comment: Token-bucket rate limiter: max 1 req/sec globally to upload.wikimedia.org, max 2 in-flight. Prevents CDN 429 without serialising other sources.

archive._comment: Each Archive item requires a separate metadata call. Keep delay_ms_min >= 200.

openverse._comment: Set OPENVERSE_CLIENT_ID + OPENVERSE_CLIENT_SECRET for standard tier.

europeana._comment: Set EUROPEANA_API_KEY env var. 10K calls/day with registered free key.
